public_reputation: Known around Lantern Docket through day-to-day work as local fixer.
appearance: Veyl Coilspire usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their local fixer status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Knows who actually gets things done when formal systems slow down or become too expensive to trust. In Lantern Docket, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of local fixer in and around Lantern Docket, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Lantern Docket workable through the obligations of local fixer while managing the immediate pressure of backlog pressure, misclassification.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of local fixer credible while absorbing the strain created by backlog pressure, misclassification.

Veyl Coilspire becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with backlog pressure, misclassification around Lantern Docket.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Veyl Coilspire is immediately readable as a local fixer tied to Lantern Docket.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Lantern Docket: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Veyl Coilspire presents as someone shaped by the duties of a local fixer and the daily pressures of Lantern Docket.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a local fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Lantern Docket harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Veyl Coilspire refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a local fixer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can get difficult things done through informal channels.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Veyl Coilspire adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Veyl Coilspire always knows more about Lantern Docket than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a local fixer in Lantern Docket.
